user.title: Select Device Type
user.description: Choose the type of SNMP device you want to add.

connection.title: Connect to {device_type}
connection.description: Enter the connection details for your device.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the device
data_description.community: SNMP community string (usually 'private' for read-write access)
data_description.name: Friendly name for this device

outlets.title: Configure Outlet Names
outlets.description: Found {outlet_count} outlets/groups. Customize the names below.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Check the host address and community string.

init.title: Configure Outlet Names
init.description: Update the names for each outlet/group.

abort.no_outlets: This device has no configurable outlets.
